testcase.name: isMigratableFlowNode > should return true for ad hoc sub process
isMigratableFlowNode > conditional events > should return true for boundary event with conditional event definition
isMigratableFlowNode > conditional events > should return true for intermediate catch event with conditional event definition
isMigratableFlowNode > conditional events > should return true for event subprocess with conditional start event
isMigratableFlowNode > conditional events > should return true for start event with conditional event definition inside event subprocess
